title: Acetaminophen tablets measured dose — heading 3004
source: HTS heading 3004 text + dosage-form practice; peer analgesic capsules/tablets under 3004 (e.g. NY N316279 combination capsules 3004.90.9228). Pairs with NY R04092 bulk acetaminophen at 6.5%.

value_note.contrast: Bulk acetaminophen NY R04092 is 6.5% MFN — real dollar delta if origin does not erase it via preference
